revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Korea | flag alias = Flag of Korea (1899).svg | flag alias-1392 = Royal Flag of Goryeo bonggi.svg | border-1392 = | flag alias-1800 = Flag of the king of Joseon.svg | border-1800 = | flag alias-1856 = Flag of Korea (1856).png | border-1856 = | flag alias-1876 = Flag of the King of Joseon (1876).png | border-1876 = | flag alias-1882 = Flag of Korea (1882–1910).svg | flag alias-1888 = Flag of Korea (1888–1893).svg | flag alias-1893 = Flag of Korea (1893).svg | flag alias-1905 = Flag of the Japanese Resident General of Korea (1905).svg | flag alias-1910 = Merchant flag of Japan (1870).svg | flag alias-unification = Unification flag of Korea.svg | flag alias-football = Unification flag of Korea.svg | flag alias-naval = Ensign of the Joseon Navy.png | link alias-naval = Korean Navy | link alias-army = Imperial Korean Army | flag alias-navy = Ensign of the Joseon Navy.png | link alias-navy = Korean Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | size flag alias-1800 = 25px | size flag alias-1856 = 25px | size flag alias-1876 = 25px | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1392 | var2 = 1800 | var3 = 1856 | var4 = 1876 | var5 = 1882 | var6 = 1888 | var7 = 1893 | var8 = 1905 | var9 = 1910 | var10 = unification | related1 = First Republic of Korea | related2 = Second Republic of Korea | related3 = Supreme Council for National Reconstruction | related4 = Third Republic of Korea | related5 = Fourth Republic of Korea | related6 = Fifth Republic of Korea | related7 = Korean Empire | related8 = North Korea | related9 = Joseon | related10 = South Korea | related11 = Korea under Japanese rule | flag link = List of Korean flags </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Korea here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Korea for full history.
